title: The One with the Monkey
weakest_section: 14:29-15:19 range with food/party setup having fewer strong jokes

jokes.text: And look, Ugly Naked Guy is hanging candy canes.
jokes.setup: Character observing neighbor through window during Christmas
jokes.punchline: The visual of a naked man decorating with candy canes
jokes.explanation: Visual absurdity with good economy, establishes recurring character bit

jokes.text: Where? Oh. Well. That's festive.
jokes.setup: Chandler looking for the 'candy canes' then realizing what he's actually seeing
jokes.punchline: Dry understatement about naked man's genitals being 'festive'
jokes.explanation: Perfect Chandler delivery with excellent misdirection and understatement

jokes.text: That is so cruel. Why would a parent name their child Bethel?
jokes.setup: Discussion about monkey being saved from lab by friend named Bethel
jokes.punchline: Misdirection from lab cruelty to name cruelty
jokes.explanation: Excellent misdirection with perfect character voice and timing

jokes.text: That monkey's got a Ross on his ass.
jokes.setup: Monkey is attached to Ross
jokes.punchline: Reversal of 'monkey on his back' idiom
jokes.explanation: Solid wordplay with good economy, fits Joey's simple humor style

jokes.text: You reach a certain age, having a roommate is just kind of pathet
jokes.setup: Ross explaining why he doesn't want a roommate
jokes.punchline: Cut off mid-word 'pathetic' - ironic given his situation
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Ross's defensiveness about his situation

jokes.text: That's 'pathet.' Sanskrit for 'really cool way to live.'
jokes.setup: Ross's embarrassment at being cut off
jokes.punchline: Chandler's fake scholarly explanation
jokes.explanation: Classic Chandler sarcasm with pseudo-intellectual twist

jokes.text: I'm doing new material tonight. I have 12 songs about my mother's suicide and one about a snowman.
jokes.setup: Phoebe announcing her musical set
jokes.punchline: Extreme tonal whiplash between dark and light topics
jokes.explanation: Perfect Phoebe absurdity with dark humor twist, excellent character integration

jokes.text: You might wanna open with the snowman.
jokes.setup: Phoebe's disturbing setlist announcement
jokes.punchline: Understated practical advice about song order
jokes.explanation: Perfect deadpan reaction with excellent economy

jokes.text: Some fat guy's sleeping with the store manager.
jokes.setup: Joey explaining why he didn't get the Santa job despite experience
jokes.punchline: Blunt, crude explanation of workplace politics
jokes.explanation: Basic character humor, fits Joey but not particularly clever

jokes.text: He's not even jolly. It's all political.
jokes.setup: Joey's complaint about the other Santa
jokes.punchline: Treating Santa job selection like serious politics
jokes.explanation: Good character voice showing Joey's earnestness about trivial things

jokes.text: ...of finding lips to kiss when the ball drops!
jokes.setup: Monica explaining New Year's pressure
jokes.punchline: Reducing romantic moment to anatomical necessity
jokes.explanation: Decent observational humor about holiday pressure

jokes.text: Man, I'm talking loud!
jokes.setup: Monica getting worked up about New Year's
jokes.punchline: Self-aware comment about her own volume
jokes.explanation: Weak meta humor, doesn't add much comedic value

jokes.text: -I'll be just as pathetic as you. -Yeah, you wish.
jokes.setup: Rachel saying she'll be as pathetic as Monica
jokes.punchline: Monica's competitive response about who's more pathetic
jokes.explanation: Good character dynamic showing Monica's competitiveness even about being pathetic

jokes.text: I've got an idea. Dinner. It's perfect. We'll put it between lunch and breakfast.
jokes.setup: Monica suggesting dinner as a novel idea
jokes.punchline: Explaining dinner timing as if it's revolutionary
jokes.explanation: Mild absurdist humor showing Monica's over-enthusiasm

jokes.text: I'm sick of being a victim of this Dick Clark holiday.
jokes.setup: Monica's frustration with New Year's
jokes.punchline: Blaming Dick Clark personally for New Year's pressure
jokes.explanation: Good character moment with specific cultural reference

jokes.text: I was hoping for more enthusiasm.
jokes.setup: Friends' lukewarm response to dinner pact
jokes.punchline: Monica's understated disappointment
jokes.explanation: Mild character humor showing Monica's need for validation

jokes.text: I made a man with eyes of coal / And a smile so bewitching / How was I supposed to know / That my mom was dead in the kitchen?
jokes.setup: Phoebe's seemingly innocent snowman song
jokes.punchline: Abrupt shift to dead mother discovery
jokes.explanation: Brilliant dark comedy perfectly integrated with character, shocking tonal shift executed flawlessly

jokes.text: My mother's ashes / Even her eyelashes / Are resting in a little yellow jar
jokes.setup: Continuation of morbid song
jokes.punchline: Specific detail about eyelashes in cremation
jokes.explanation: Continuing the dark comedy with absurd specific details

jokes.text: And sometimes when it's freezing / I feel a little sneezy / And now I— Excuse me? Excuse me? Yeah, noisy boys.
jokes.setup: Phoebe's performance being interrupted by talking audience
jokes.punchline: Her confrontational response to hecklers
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Phoebe's assertiveness

jokes.text: Is it something you'd like to share with the group?
jokes.setup: Phoebe addressing disruptive audience members
jokes.punchline: Teacher-like scolding at coffee house
jokes.explanation: Decent character moment with familiar teacher trope

jokes.text: That guy's going home with a note.
jokes.setup: Watching the romantic interaction at Phoebe's show
jokes.punchline: School detention reference for adult dating
jokes.explanation: Good observational humor with school metaphor

jokes.text: I said I liked her in Splash, but not Wall Street. I thought she had a hard quality.
jokes.setup: Guy explaining his Daryl Hannah opinion to impress date
jokes.punchline: Overthinking actress performance to sound sophisticated
jokes.explanation: Decent satire of pretentious film discussion

jokes.text: While Daryl is beautiful in a conventional way... you are luminous with a kind of delicate grace.
jokes.setup: Guy trying to compliment his date
jokes.punchline: Over-the-top flowery language that sounds rehearsed
jokes.explanation: Basic cringe humor about awkward pickup lines

jokes.text: That guy's going home with more than a note.
jokes.setup: Seeing the successful romantic interaction
jokes.punchline: Escalation of earlier 'note' joke with sexual innuendo
jokes.explanation: Good callback with escalation and innuendo

jokes.text: I can't believe he hasn't kissed you yet. By my sixth date with Paolo, he'd already named both my breasts.
jokes.setup: Rachel commenting on David's slow romantic pace
jokes.punchline: Oversharing about Paolo's premature intimacy
jokes.explanation: Good character moment with unexpected escalation

jokes.text: Did I just share too much? Just a smidge.
jokes.setup: Rachel realizing she overshared
jokes.punchline: Monica's massive understatement about the TMI
jokes.explanation: Good understatement joke with timing

jokes.text: He's kind of like the guy I went to see that with. Except he's smarter and gentler and sweeter.
jokes.setup: Phoebe comparing David to Officer and a Gentleman
jokes.punchline: Comparing him to her movie companion rather than the movie character
jokes.explanation: Classic Phoebe logic subversion, perfectly in character

jokes.text: I just wanna be with him all the time. You know, day and night. And night and day. And special occasions.
jokes.setup: Phoebe expressing her feelings for David
jokes.punchline: Redundant time descriptions ending with random addition
jokes.explanation: Good character voice showing Phoebe's scattered thought process

jokes.text: This was a pact! This was your pact! I couldn't handle the pressure. I snapped!
jokes.setup: Friends discovering Chandler broke the no-date pact
jokes.punchline: Chandler's dramatic confession of weakness
jokes.explanation: Good character breakdown moment with escalating panic

jokes.text: Too many jokes.
jokes.setup: Ross arriving late to tense situation
jokes.punchline: Ross's attempt to lighten mood falling flat
jokes.explanation: Good awkward Ross moment with meta element

jokes.text: Must mock Joey.
jokes.setup: Chandler seeing Joey in elf costume
jokes.punchline: Stating his impulse to mock as if compelled
jokes.explanation: Perfect Chandler meta-awareness with excellent economy

jokes.text: Nice shoes, huh? God, you're killing me!
jokes.setup: Chandler's weak attempt at mocking Joey's elf costume
jokes.punchline: Joey's oblivious appreciation of the compliment
jokes.explanation: Good character dynamic showing Joey's obliviousness

jokes.text: It has to do with my working late. I said some things that I didn't mean. He threw some feces.
jokes.setup: Ross describing fight with Marcel
jokes.punchline: Escalation from emotional hurt to literal feces throwing
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalation from human to animal behavior with perfect timing

jokes.text: But make sure it seems like you're there to see him. You're not doing it for me. Okay. But if he asks, I'm not going to lie.
jokes.setup: Ross asking Chandler to check on Marcel
jokes.punchline: Chandler treating monkey babysitting with complete seriousness
jokes.explanation: Good absurdist moment treating monkey relationship seriously

jokes.text: Do you plan on kissing me ever?
jokes.setup: David's scientific explanation
jokes.punchline: Phoebe's blunt interruption cutting through science talk
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Phoebe's directness

jokes.text: But I wanted it to be this phenomenal kiss... at a phenomenal moment because it's you.
jokes.setup: David explaining his hesitation
jokes.punchline: Sweet but overthinking romantic gesture
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing David's overthinking nature

jokes.text: Now, it's just gotta be one of those things where I... sweep everything off the table. And I'm not really a sweeping sort of fella.
jokes.setup: David building up to romantic gesture
jokes.punchline: Self-awareness of his non-romantic nature
jokes.explanation: Good character self-awareness with romantic comedy trope reference

jokes.text: I mean, you're a sweeper trapped inside a physicist's body.
jokes.setup: Phoebe encouraging David
jokes.punchline: Treating romantic sweeping as trapped identity
jokes.explanation: Classic Phoebe wisdom with absurd psychological framing

jokes.text: You know what? This is really expensive. And this was a gift.
jokes.setup: David attempting to sweep table for romantic gesture
jokes.punchline: Practical concerns interrupting romantic moment
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment showing David's practical nature undermining romance

jokes.text: Now you're just tidying up.
jokes.setup: David carefully moving items instead of sweeping them
jokes.punchline: Phoebe's dry observation of anti-romantic behavior
jokes.explanation: Perfect understated observation with excellent economy

jokes.text: You want me to throw you? I can hop.
jokes.setup: David offering to lift Phoebe onto table
jokes.punchline: Phoebe's practical solution to romantic gesture
jokes.explanation: Good physical comedy with characters finding practical solutions

jokes.text: You know more than one Fun Bobby? I happen to know a Fun Bob.
jokes.setup: Discussion of Fun Bobby as ex-boyfriend
jokes.punchline: Chandler's distinction between Fun Bobby and Fun Bob
jokes.explanation: Mild wordplay joke about similar names

jokes.text: There's no room for milk. There. Now there is.
jokes.setup: Chandler dealing with overstuffed fridge
jokes.punchline: Drinking milk to make room rather than rearranging
jokes.explanation: Good physical comedy with logical but absurd solution

jokes.text: What's an elf to do?
jokes.setup: Joey explaining his dating situation while in elf costume
jokes.punchline: Philosophical question about elf dating life
jokes.explanation: Good character moment combining costume with dating philosophy

jokes.text: So I'll be the only one alone when the ball drops? We'll have a big party, and no one will know who's with who. I'll know.
jokes.setup: Everyone else having dates despite the pact
jokes.punchline: Chandler's sad realization about being alone
jokes.explanation: Good character vulnerability moment with relatable loneliness

jokes.text: He's walking around all the time, dragging his hands.
jokes.setup: Ross describing Marcel's strange behavior
jokes.punchline: Monkey mimicking human depression behavior
jokes.explanation: Good physical comedy showing animal mimicking human emotions

jokes.text: What juggling thing? With the socks? I figured you taught him that. No. It wasn't that big a deal. Just socks. And a melon.
jokes.setup: Discovery that Marcel has been juggling
jokes.punchline: Escalation from socks to socks and a melon
jokes.explanation: Good escalation showing Chandler's casual attitude toward monkey's advanced skills

jokes.text: Minsk? Minsk. It's in Russia. I know where Minsk is.
jokes.setup: Max mentioning they're going to Minsk
jokes.punchline: Phoebe's slightly offended response to geography explanation
jokes.explanation: Mild character moment showing Phoebe's occasional indignation

jokes.text: And if you're gonna do Minsk, that's the way to go.
jokes.setup: Max explaining the grant conditions
jokes.punchline: Treating Minsk like a vacation destination choice
jokes.explanation: Mild absurdist humor about treating research assignment like tourism

jokes.text: Tell her. 'I don't wanna go... to work with Lipson, Yamaguchi and Flank. I wanna stay and make out with my girlfriend!'
jokes.setup: David's reluctance to go to Minsk
jokes.punchline: Max's crude reduction of David's romantic dilemma
jokes.explanation: Good cringe moment showing Max's insensitivity

jokes.text: Getting so good at that! It was Max's stuff.
jokes.setup: David successfully sweeping table after practice
jokes.punchline: Revealing he practiced on someone else's belongings
jokes.explanation: Good callback with character development showing David's dedication

jokes.text: I love this artichoke thing. Don't tell me what's in it. The diet starts tomorrow.
jokes.setup: Monica enjoying party food
jokes.punchline: Classic pre-diet rationalization
jokes.explanation: Basic relatable humor about diet procrastination

jokes.text: You remember Janice. Vividly.
jokes.setup: Chandler introducing Janice
jokes.punchline: Ross's pained single-word response
jokes.explanation: Good economy and understatement showing Ross's trauma

jokes.text: Now. It's amazing. We've been back together for what... like 10 minutes, and— Is that all?
jokes.setup: Janice gushing about their reunion
jokes.punchline: Chandler's horror at how short the time has been
jokes.explanation: Good character dynamic showing Chandler's regret

jokes.text: It's like we were never apart. Of course, we were, but— Forgive and forget. Well, forget.
jokes.setup: Janice's optimistic view of their reunion
jokes.punchline: Chandler correcting to just 'forget' not 'forgive'
jokes.explanation: Good wordplay showing Chandler's desire to erase memories

jokes.text: You brought your kids. Yeah. That's okay, right? Party!
jokes.setup: Joey's date bringing children to adult party
jokes.punchline: Kid's enthusiastic response to inappropriate situation
jokes.explanation: Basic situational humor about dating complications

jokes.text: That thing is not coming in here! This is how you greet guests? If I showed up with my new girlfriend, she wouldn't be welcome?
jokes.setup: Monica objecting to Marcel coming to party
jokes.punchline: Ross comparing monkey to human girlfriend
jokes.explanation: Good absurdist moment treating pet like romantic partner

jokes.text: Your new girlfriend wouldn't urinate on my coffee table.
jokes.setup: Ross's comparison of monkey to girlfriend
jokes.punchline: Monica's practical distinction about behavior
jokes.explanation: Good comeback with practical but crude logic

jokes.text: He was more embarrassed about that than anyone.
jokes.setup: Monica's complaint about Marcel urinating
jokes.punchline: Ross attributing human emotions to monkey's bathroom incident
jokes.explanation: Good absurdist character moment showing Ross's anthropomorphizing

jokes.text: Where's Paolo? Rome. Jerk missed his flight.
jokes.setup: Rachel arriving injured and alone
jokes.punchline: Blaming Paolo for missing flight after her obvious ordeal
jokes.explanation: Basic misdirection about who's at fault

jokes.text: And then your face exploded? No.
jokes.setup: Rachel's injured appearance
jokes.punchline: Phoebe's matter-of-fact question about extreme injury
jokes.explanation: Good Phoebe absurdist observation with deadpan delivery

jokes.text: ...when this woman, this blond planet with a pocketbook... starts yelling.
jokes.setup: Rachel describing her airport attacker
jokes.punchline: 'Blond planet' as description of large woman
jokes.explanation: Creative visual description with good economy

jokes.text: And I was blowing my attack whistle thingy... and three more cabs show up.
jokes.setup: Rachel describing the cab fight
jokes.punchline: Attack whistle accidentally summoning more cabs
jokes.explanation: Good absurdist escalation with unintended consequences

jokes.text: That looks okay, right? You went a bit wide on the lipstick. Oh, I did? Yeah. It's hard for me to tell. My eye's closing up.
jokes.setup: Rachel trying to apply makeup while injured
jokes.punchline: Swollen eye preventing her from seeing makeup application
jokes.explanation: Basic physical comedy about injury affecting daily tasks

jokes.text: When I saw you at the store last week... it was the first time I ever mentally undressed an elf.
jokes.setup: Sandy flirting with Joey at the party
jokes.punchline: Specific reference to Joey's elf costume in sexual context
jokes.explanation: Decent innuendo tied to Joey's costume situation

jokes.text: Wow, that's dirty. Yeah.
jokes.setup: Sandy's elf undressing comment
jokes.punchline: Joey's obvious statement and Sandy's proud agreement
jokes.explanation: Basic reaction to innuendo, not particularly clever

jokes.text: He doesn't have to spend the whole evening with me... but at least check in.
jokes.setup: Chandler looking for Marcel at the party
jokes.punchline: Treating monkey relationship like human romantic relationship
jokes.explanation: Good absurdist moment showing Chandler's anthropomorphizing

jokes.text: Smile. You're on Janice Camera.
jokes.setup: Janice taking photos
jokes.punchline: Pun on 'Candid Camera' with her own name
jokes.explanation: Basic pun fitting Janice's annoying character

jokes.text: Kill me. Kill me now.
jokes.setup: Janice's camera pun and general presence
jokes.punchline: Chandler's dramatic plea for death
jokes.explanation: Classic Chandler dramatic overreaction with good economy

jokes.text: Hey, sorry I'm late. But my grandfather... died about two hours ago. But I couldn't get a flight out till tomorrow, so here I am.
jokes.setup: Fun Bobby arriving at New Year's party
jokes.punchline: Casually mentioning death then continuing to party
jokes.explanation: Excellent dark humor subverting 'Fun Bobby' expectations

jokes.text: Hey, Fun Bobby! How's it going, man? Whoa! Who died?
jokes.setup: Joey greeting Bobby enthusiastically
jokes.punchline: Accidentally appropriate casual question
jokes.explanation: Perfect ironic timing with innocent question becoming literal

jokes.text: It's gonna be an open casket, you know? So at least I'll get to see him again.
jokes.setup: Bobby continuing to share death details
jokes.punchline: Morbidly optimistic spin on funeral arrangements
jokes.explanation: Good dark humor continuation showing Bobby's inappropriate optimism

jokes.text: Bobby? Fun Bobby?
jokes.setup: Bobby's depressing presence at party
jokes.punchline: Monica questioning his 'Fun' designation
jokes.explanation: Good ironic observation about nickname vs. reality

jokes.text: But you're really bringing the party down.
jokes.setup: Monica's attempt to console Bobby about loss
jokes.punchline: Blunt assessment of his effect on party mood
jokes.explanation: Good Monica bluntness with perfect timing

jokes.text: I'm gonna blow this one up and write 'Reunited' in glitter.
jokes.setup: Janice taking photos of her and Chandler
jokes.punchline: Over-the-top scrapbooking plans for brief reunion
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Janice's excessive sentimentality

jokes.text: You listen to me! You listen to me! One of these times, it's just gonna be your last chance with me!
jokes.setup: Chandler trying to break up with Janice again
jokes.punchline: Janice threatening to dump him first repeatedly
jokes.explanation: Good character dynamic showing their dysfunctional pattern

jokes.text: Hi, Max. Yoko.
jokes.setup: David arriving as Max is leaving
jokes.punchline: Max calling Phoebe 'Yoko' like Ono breaking up Beatles
jokes.explanation: Good cultural reference showing Max's bitterness

jokes.text: It won't be the same... but it will still be Minsk.
jokes.setup: Max's decision to go to Minsk alone
jokes.punchline: Underwhelming sales pitch for scientific opportunity
jokes.explanation: Good understated humor about disappointing situations

jokes.text: You belong in Minsk. You can't stay here just for me. If I go, I have to break up with you. And I can't break up with you.
jokes.setup: David's dilemma about leaving for Minsk
jokes.punchline: David's circular logical trap
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing David's overthinking nature

jokes.text: Just say, 'Phoebe, I love you, but my work is my life. That's what I have to do.' And I say, 'Your work? How can you say that?' Then you say, 'I have no choice. Can't you understand that?' And I say, 'No! No! I can't understand that!'
jokes.setup: Phoebe helping David break up with her
jokes.punchline: Scripting both sides of their breakup conversation
jokes.explanation: Brilliant character moment showing Phoebe's unique approach to difficult situations

jokes.text: I'm gonna miss you, you scientist guy.
jokes.setup: Phoebe's final words to David
jokes.punchline: Sweet but characteristically simple nickname
jokes.explanation: Good character voice showing Phoebe's simple affection

jokes.text: And then the peacock bit me.
jokes.setup: Ross telling a story to children
jokes.punchline: Unexpected animal attack in children's story
jokes.explanation: Good absurdist moment in children's storytelling context

jokes.text: Please kiss me at midnight!
jokes.setup: Chandler's desperate New Year's situation
jokes.punchline: Public plea for any romantic contact
jokes.explanation: Good character desperation moment fitting the situation

jokes.text: You seen Sandy? I don't know how to tell you this... but she's in the bedroom getting it on with Max. Oh, I did know how to tell you.
jokes.setup: Chandler hesitating to deliver bad news
jokes.punchline: Immediately contradicting his claim about not knowing how to say it
jokes.explanation: Good meta humor about communication clichés

jokes.text: Everybody looks so happy. I hate that! Not everybody is happy. Hey, Bobby!
jokes.setup: Chandler's bitterness about others' happiness
jokes.punchline: Monica pointing to grieving Bobby as proof not everyone's happy
jokes.explanation: Good dark callback using Bobby's grief as evidence

jokes.text: I thought I'd throw this out. I'm no math whiz... but I do believe there are three girls and three guys right here.
jokes.setup: Everyone complaining about kissing situation
jokes.punchline: Chandler's obvious mathematical observation
jokes.explanation: Basic logical observation with slight sarcasm

jokes.text: I don't feel like kissing anyone tonight. I can't kiss anyone. So, I'm kissing everyone? No, you can't kiss Ross. That's your brother.
jokes.setup: Working out New Year's kissing logistics
jokes.punchline: Chandler's realization he'll kiss everyone, then Monica's obvious restriction
jokes.explanation: Good escalation with logical but awkward restrictions

jokes.text: So now everybody's getting kissed but me. Somebody kiss me. Somebody kiss me! It's midnight! Somebody kiss me!
jokes.setup: Chandler realizing he's excluded from kissing arrangement
jokes.punchline: Escalating desperation ending in public pleading
jokes.explanation: Good escalation showing Chandler's desperation with repetition for emphasis

jokes.text: I wanted this to work so much. I'm still in there. Changing his diapers. Picking his fleas. But he's just phoning it in.
jokes.setup: Ross expressing disappointment about Marcel
jokes.punchline: Describing monkey relationship like romantic disappointment
jokes.explanation: Great absurdist moment treating pet care like relationship labor

jokes.text: It's hard that something you love so much doesn't love you back.
jokes.setup: Ross's relationship disappointment with Marcel
jokes.punchline: Universal relationship truth applied to human-monkey dynamic
jokes.explanation: Good emotional humor applying human relationship wisdom to pets

jokes.text: I think that bitch cracked my tooth.
jokes.setup: Rachel touching her injured mouth
jokes.punchline: Blunt assessment of airport fight damage
jokes.explanation: Simple callback to earlier fight story with blunt assessment

tmdb_overview: The group breaks a New Year's Eve pact; Ross acquires a monkey named Marcel as a roommate.
